mnemonics.title: Handshaking Lemma
mnemonics.content: HANDSHAKE: Have All Neighbors Double Sum, Halving Always Keeps Equality. (Sum of degrees = 2 × edges)

mnemonics.title: Complete Graph Edge Count
mnemonics.content: KNₙ Complete: Know Nodes, (n-1) edges per vertex, but No double-counting, so divide by 2: n(n-1)/2

mnemonics.title: Graph Representations
mnemonics.content: MATrix for Dense, LIST for Sparse: More Adjacencies Together vs. Limited Individual Sparse Tables

mnemonics.title: Regular Graphs
mnemonics.content: REGULAR: Really Every Graph's Vertex Uniformly Links All Round

mnemonics.title: Bipartite Graphs
mnemonics.content: BI-PART-ite: Both Independent Parts Are Radically Totally Independent, Twice Exceptional
